params.name: teamName
params.description: EMSX team name for shared blotter access

params.name: status
params.description: Filter orders by status

params.name: ticker
params.description: Filter by Bloomberg security ticker

params.name: side
params.description: Filter by order side

params.name: fromDate
params.description: Filter orders created on or after this date

params.name: toDate
params.description: Filter orders created on or before this date

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of orders to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of orders to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve a list of orders in the EMSX blotter. Supports filtering by status, ticker, side, and date range. Returns order-level fields including ticker, amount, limit price, order type, time in force, and current fill status.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX Create a new order

params.name: teamName
params.description: EMSX team name for shared blotter access

items.docs: Create a new order in the EMSX blotter. The order is placed on the blotter and can subsequently be routed to a broker for execution. Supports equity, fixed income, futures, and options instruments.

params.name: orderSequenceNumber
params.description: EMSX order sequence number

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information about a specific order by its EMSX sequence number, including all order fields, current status, and associated routes.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX Modify an existing order

params.name: orderSequenceNumber
params.description: EMSX order sequence number

items.docs: Modify fields on an existing order such as amount, limit price, order type, or time in force. Only unfilled or partially filled orders can be modified.

params.name: orderSequenceNumber
params.description: EMSX order sequence number

items.docs: Delete an order from the EMSX blotter. Only orders with no active routes can be deleted. Orders with active routes must have their routes cancelled first.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX Create an order and route it simultaneously

params.name: teamName
params.description: EMSX team name for shared blotter access

items.docs: Create a new order and immediately route it to a specified broker in a single operation. This combines order creation and route creation for streamlined execution workflows.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX Route multiple orders to a broker

items.docs: Route a group of existing orders to a specified broker in a single batch operation. All orders in the group are routed with the same broker and strategy parameters.

params.name: teamName
params.description: EMSX team name for shared blotter access

params.name: status
params.description: Filter routes by status

params.name: broker
params.description: Filter by broker code

params.name: orderSequenceNumber
params.description: Filter routes by parent order sequence number

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of routes to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of routes to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve a list of routes across all orders. Supports filtering by route status, broker, and associated order. Returns route-level fields including broker, strategy, filled amount, and average price.

params.name: routeId
params.description: EMSX route identifier

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information about a specific route, including broker, strategy, fill status, and all route-level fields.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX Modify an existing route

params.name: routeId
params.description: EMSX route identifier

items.docs: Modify fields on an existing route such as amount, limit price, or strategy parameters. Only working or partially filled routes can be modified.

params.name: routeId
params.description: EMSX route identifier

items.docs: Cancel an active route. Sends a cancel request to the broker. Only working or partially filled routes can be cancelled.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX Create a manual fill

items.docs: Manually record a fill against a route. Used for reporting executions that occurred outside of electronic routing, such as voice-brokered trades.

params.name: teamName
params.description: EMSX team name for shared blotter access

params.name: ticker
params.description: Filter fills by Bloomberg security ticker

params.name: broker
params.description: Filter fills by broker code

params.name: orderSequenceNumber
params.description: Filter fills by parent order sequence number

params.name: routeId
params.description: Filter fills by route identifier

params.name: fromDate
params.description: Filter fills on or after this date

params.name: toDate
params.description: Filter fills on or before this date

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of fills to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of fills to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve a list of trade executions and fills. Supports filtering by ticker, broker, date range, and associated order or route.

params.name: fillId
params.description: Unique identifier of the fill

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information about a specific fill or execution, including price, quantity, broker, timestamp, and settlement details.

params.name: assetClass
params.description: Filter brokers by asset class

params.name: ticker
params.description: Bloomberg ticker to find brokers available for a specific security

items.docs: Retrieve a list of brokers available for routing orders. Can be filtered by asset class and security type. Returns broker codes, names, and supported strategies.

params.name: brokerCode
params.description: Bloomberg broker code

params.name: assetClass
params.description: Filter strategies by asset class

items.docs: Retrieve the list of execution strategies available from a specific broker, including algorithmic strategies and their configurable parameters.
Retrieve a list of EMSX trading teams that the authenticated user has access to.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX List available order fields

items.docs: Retrieve the list of available fields for orders, including field names, types, and descriptions.

info.name: Bloomberg EMSX List available route fields

items.docs: Retrieve the list of available fields for routes, including field names, types, and descriptions.
